TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Peldac_i_sakul, title = Peldac_i_sakul, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Peldac_i_sakul} }

S.FORM: u pildac nanu kasumamadan tuidaw nikaidawan nu pildac kuni idawtu Ku sakidaya.u tatiedan nu pinacadan kya pildac.anu inayi`kidapildac caay kya paudipay Ku pinacadan nusakidaya,u Laylau nu sakidaya caay pakaliyas tu pildac maudip.antacuwacuwa ku pinacadan nu sakidaya sa million tu tu pildac palawyna tu tinapildac,
S.PHON: u pir~…æda ¶ nanu kasumamadan tuidaw nikaidawan nu pir~…æda ¶ kuni idawtu ku sakidaja.u tati…ôdan nu pina ¶adan kja pir~…æda ¶.anu inaji`kidapir~…æda ¶ ¶aaj kja paudipaj ku pina ¶adan nusakidaja,u r~…æajr~…æau nu sakidaja ¶aaj pakar~…æijas tu pir~…æda ¶ maudip.anta ¶uwa ¶uwa ku pina ¶adan nu sakidaja sa mir~…ær~…æion tu tu pir~…æda ¶ par~…æawjna tu tinapir~…æda ¶,
S.FORM: u pildac nanu kasumamadan tuidaw nikaidawan nu pildac kuni idawtu Ku sakidaya.u tatiedan nu pinacadan kya pildac.anu inayi`kidapildac caay kya paudipay Ku pinacadan nusakidaya,u Laylau nu sakidaya caay pakaliyas tu pildac maudip.antacuwacuwa ku pinacadan nu sakidaya sa million tu tu pildac palawyna tu tinapildac,
S.PHON: u pir~…æda ¶ nanu kasumamadan tuidaw nikaidawan nu pir~…æda ¶ kuni idawtu ku sakidaja.u tati…ôdan nu pina ¶adan kja pir~…æda ¶.anu inaji`kidapir~…æda ¶ ¶aaj kja paudipaj ku pina ¶adan nusakidaja,u r~…æajr~…æau nu sakidaja ¶aaj pakar~…æijas tu pir~…æda ¶ maudip.anta ¶uwa ¶uwa ku pina ¶adan nu sakidaja sa mir~…ær~…æion tu tu pir~…æda ¶ par~…æawjna tu tinapir~…æda ¶,
